name: Doge Head Attack
short_description: Doge Head Attack is a meme-inspired platformer that takes you through four unique and challenging levels. Face themed bosses and earn extra lives with fun mini-games. Dare to discover the secrets and challenges that await you!
detailed_description:
Welcome to "Doge Head Attack"! An exciting platformer inspired by Memecoins. Embark on an epic adventure through four unique levels, filled with challenges and mini-games that will test your skills. This meme-inspired game features plenty of jokes and humor to keep you entertained!

Key Features:

  • Epic Adventures: Explore themed levels with vibrant graphics and challenging obstacles.

  • Fun Mini-Games: Earn extra lives and discover hidden secrets in each level.

  • Intuitive Controls: Designed for a smooth gaming experience across all platforms.

Levels:

  • Level 1: Face the boss FLOKY and overcome the initial obstacles.

  • Level 2: Challenge the cunning PEPE in his domain.

  • Level 3: Prepare for the powerful DOGE and his unpredictable tricks.

  • Level 4: A surprise level that will amaze players with new challenges.

Download "Doge Head Attack" now and join the fun!

Controls:

D: Right.

A: Left.

K: Shoot.

J: Jump.

ESC: Pause.
